LAW AND MOTION 301, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT CONTINUED FROM NOV-19-2009 TO LAW AND MOTION AT NOV-23-2009, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES.

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT WILLIAM GABRIEL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR AND STAYED PENDING THE DETERMINATION OF THE PROBATE COURT ON THE MOTIONS PENDING BEFORE IT. EITHER PARTY CAN RENOTICE THIS MOTION TO PUT BACK ON CALENDAR AND PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED LEAVE TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT, IF HE CHOOSES TO DO SO. MR. CONNOR IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JANET POND CSR # 5292
